summary: Advanced Old Yoshi stage decompilation by replacing several placeholders in groldyoshi.c with concrete stage data, callbacks, cloud platform behavior, guest object behavior, collision callback handling, and a movement helper. The PR also refined Old Yoshi-specific Ground union structs in gr/types.h and tightened groldyoshi.h prototypes. The title claims groldyoshi.c reached 95%, but the provided slice has no PR body or review comments explaining remaining gaps.
what_changed: Defined Old Yoshi stage callback table grOy_803E6488 in groldyoshi.c instead of leaving it extern.
Defined StageData grOy_803E650C for /GrOy.dat with stage id 29 and Old Yoshi lifecycle callbacks.
Expanded the static grOy_804D6A88 data shape from a single int to a parameter block with s16 and float fields used by cloud and guest timing/movement logic.

Added concrete implementation for grOldYoshi_8020EAFC to initialize Old Yoshi cloud ground variables, bind joints, set animation, read initial joint Y translations, and register mpJointSetCb1 collision callbacks.

Added grOldYoshi_8020EC10 as the per-frame cloud state machine, including rising/falling offsets, animation transitions, effect spawn via grLib_801C97DC, collision joint enable/disable via mpLib_80057BC0 and mpJointListAdd, and HSD_JObj translate-Y updates.
Added inline random range helpers randi_between and rand_inline, though randi_between appears unused in the shown diff and has commented-out fallback code.
Added grOldYoshi_8020EFCC to initialize Old Yoshi guest state, hide the root JObj with flag 0x10, choose a randomized delay, and set x11_flags.b012.
Added grOldYoshi_8020F088 as the guest update routine, selecting one of five guest joints, randomizing vertical position, unhiding/hiding selected JObjs, and resetting after animation completion.

Reworked fn_8020F2A8 from a placeholder-style joint pair traversal into a concrete collision callback that maps the touched joint id through grOy_803E6574 and marks the matching cloud active when coll->x34_flags.b1234 equals 1.
Implemented grOldYoshi_8020F31C as a float helper for acceleration/deceleration toward a target with clamping to min/max velocity parameters.
Changed grOy_803E6574 from an extern joint-pair struct array concept to a local s16 array containing flattened joint id pairs: 0,1,1,5,2,9.
Added const int grOy_803B83F0[5] = {1,2,3,4,5} for random guest joint selection.
Removed obsolete grOldYoshi_Entry and grOldYoshi_GroundVars definitions from gr/types.h.
Added grOldYoshi_Cloud, grOldYoshi_Cloud_GroundVars, and grOldYoshi_Guest_GroundVars structs to gr/types.h and inserted oldyoshicloud and oldyoshiguest variants into Ground::gv.
Updated groldyoshi.h to remove unused forward includes and replace the unknown grOldYoshi_8020F31C prototype with a typed float signature.
smart_moves: Separated Old Yoshi ground variable layouts into cloud-specific and guest-specific structs instead of forcing one generic grOldYoshi_Entry array, making the union fields match actual stage object roles.
Preserved bitfield semantics for the cloud state byte by naming xC4_0123, xC4_4, and xC4_567 around the packed fields used by the state machine.

Used a flattened joint id table grOy_803E6574 consistently for cloud collision joint id and animation/display joint id pairs, reducing repeated magic constants in initialization, update, and callback code.
Converted grOldYoshi_8020F31C from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to a typed float function once its arithmetic behavior was understood.
Added the more precise includes needed by the decompiled code, such as grlib.h, mplib.h, and baselib/random.h, instead of relying on broad forward declarations.
Kept the collision callback narrow: it exits unless the collision flag matches the expected state and unless the joint id is one of the three Old Yoshi cloud joints.
decomp_lessons: For stage files, matching often requires reconstructing StageCallbacks and StageData globals before individual callbacks become meaningful.
When a Ground union member is shared by multiple map objects with different behavior, splitting it into role-specific structs can produce clearer field offsets and better matching code.

Stage moving-platform logic may combine HSD_JObj transforms, grAnime calls, mpLib joint activation/deactivation, and ground collision callbacks in one state machine; all of those systems need correct headers and prototypes.
Bitfield widths in GroundVars matter: the Old Yoshi cloud state uses a 4-bit state, a 1-bit contact/activation flag, and an 8-bit timer/counter packed at xC4.
Callback prototypes should be tightened as soon as enough argument evidence exists; replacing placeholder signatures helps downstream matching and prevents accidental misuse.
Randomized stage behavior may need small inline range helpers to match generated code, even when the logic looks simpler than a normal utility wrapper.
naming_conventions: Old Yoshi stage symbols use the grOldYoshi_8020XXXX function naming pattern and grOy_803XXXXX/grOy_804XXXXX data-symbol prefix.
Ground union fields for newly identified Old Yoshi roles were named oldyoshicloud and oldyoshiguest.
Struct names follow stage-qualified names such as grOldYoshi_Cloud, grOldYoshi_Cloud_GroundVars, and grOldYoshi_Guest_GroundVars.
Unknown struct fields retained offset-style names like xC4_0123, xC4_4, xC4_567, xC8, xCC, xD0, and xD4, which is appropriate when semantics are only partially known.
The local helper table grOy_803E6574 retained its data-symbol name while its previous grOy_JointPair typedef was removed in favor of a simple s16 array.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used PAD_STACK(4) in grOldYoshi_8020EAFC, indicating stack padding was needed for matching.
Flattened the joint pair data into an s16 array and accessed it with i * 2 and i * 2 + 1, likely matching the original indexing pattern better than a struct-array abstraction.
Introduced rand_inline with branch structure around HSD_Randi to match random range selection codegen.
Copied grOy_803B83F0 values into a local stack array before selecting with HSD_Randi(5), suggesting stack-local array materialization was needed for the guest selection function.
Used explicit HSD_JObjSetFlagsAll/HSD_JObjClearFlagsAll with flag 0x10/16 to match hide/show transitions around cloud and guest JObjs.
Implemented grOldYoshi_8020F31C with explicit absolute-value branches and clamp branches rather than a higher-level math helper, preserving likely decompiler/codegen shape.
review_feedback: No review comments were included in the provided slice.
The context reports one issue comment, but its body was not present in the excerpt, so no concrete reviewer feedback can be attributed.
follow_up_queries: Check the full PR diff or final merged file to verify whether randi_between remained unused and whether its missing equal-case return was accepted as matching-safe.
Inspect generated map symbols or later PRs for semantic names for grOy_804D6A88 fields x0, x2, x4, x8, xC, x10, x12, x14, x16, and x18.
Compare later groldyoshi.c work to see which functions remained unmatched after this 95% milestone.
Look for subsequent cleanup of local variable names in grOldYoshi_8020EC10 and grOldYoshi_8020F088, especially uVar3, dVar9, dVar10, and local34.
Search for later review or commits touching grOldYoshi_Cloud bitfields to confirm the exact intended widths and offsets.
